case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. CHRISTOPHER ACOSTA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2013 - JUDGMENT.
